name: jasonouyang-marketplace
description: Jason Ouyang's Claude Code marketplace - problem-solving frameworks, decision analysis, and methodology skills

plugins.name: problem-solving
plugins.description: Comprehensive problem-solving orchestrator coordinating 5 cognitive agents (systems-thinking/modeling/decomposition/iteration/pattern-recognition)

plugins.name: decision-support
plugins.description: Multi-criteria decision analysis (MCDA/AHP/TOPSIS) with weighted scoring, risk adjustment, and economic evaluation

plugins.name: risk-assessment
plugins.description: Systematic risk evaluation using COSO ERM and ISO 31000 frameworks for risk identification, quantification, and mitigation

plugins.name: cost-benefit-analysis
plugins.description: Economic evaluation with ROI/NPV/IRR/TCO calculations and scenario analysis for technical decision feasibility

plugins.name: methodology-agile
plugins.description: Agile/Scrum methodology with Sprint planning, iterative development, and continuous delivery practices

plugins.name: methodology-devops
plugins.description: DevOps methodology with CI/CD pipeline design, IaC, monitoring feedback, and continuous improvement practices

plugins.name: methodology-waterfall
plugins.description: Waterfall methodology with stage-gate planning, SRS/SDD document templates, and sequential execution practices
